caption: The video features a man sitting in a podcast studio, engaging in a conversation or recording a podcast episode for "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" printed on it. The man appears to be speaking into a microphone, likely addressing an audience or a co-host. The background includes a banner with stars and the words "Unique Hustle," as well as a sign that reads "Boss Talk 101." The setting suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere, typical of a podcast recording environment. The man's body language and facial expressions indicate he is actively involved in the discussion, possibly sharing insights or personal experiences related to business or entrepreneurship.
